query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_books,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enriched_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enriched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cover_image_url IS NOT NULL AND cover_image_url != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_cover,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3_cover_url IS NOT NULL AND s3_cover_url != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as mirrored_to_s3,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cover_image_url IS NOT NULL AND cover_image_url != '' AND (s3_cover_url IS NULL OR s3_cover_url = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending_mirror
FROM book_profiles;
